SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
BannerBuilder
A utility class for building and manipulating banner ItemStacks in Minecraft.
BookBuilder
A builder class for creating and managing various types of books in Minecraft.
BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
A builder class for creating and modifying enchanted books in Minecraft.
BookBuilder.RecipeBookBuilder
A builder class for creating and modifying knowledge books in Minecraft.
BookBuilder.WritableBookBuilder
A builder class for creating and modifying writable books in Minecraft.
BookBuilder.WrittenBookBuilder
A builder class for creating and modifying written books in Minecraft.
bStats
 
bStats.AdvancedBarChart
 
bStats.AdvancedPie
 
bStats.CustomChart
 
bStats.DrilldownPie
 
bStats.JsonObjectBuilder
An extremely simple JSON builder.
bStats.JsonObjectBuilder.JsonObject
A super simple representation of a JSON object.
bStats.MetricsBase
 
bStats.MultiLineChart
 
bStats.SimpleBarChart
 
bStats.SimplePie
 
bStats.SingleLineChart
 
CompassBuilder
A builder utility for modifying and retrieving properties of a CompassMeta ItemStack.
InventoryBuilder
A builder class that manages an inventory GUI.
InventoryBuilder.LockMode
Enumeration that defines different lock modes for the inventory interaction.
InventoryButton
Represents a button in an inventory GUI.
InventoryManager
Manages the active inventories and their corresponding handlers.
ItemAttributeBuilder
A builder class for managing and modifying attribute modifiers on an ItemStack.
ItemBuilder
A utility class for building and modifying ItemStack objects.
LLibrary
The main class for the LLibrary plugin.
LoggerAPI
A utility class for logging messages to the Minecraft server console with color-coded output for different log levels.
UpdateChecker
This class is responsible for checking plugin updates by connecting to a specified API.
UpdateCheckEvent
This event is called whenever an update check is finished.
UpdateCheckResult
Represents whether a new version is available or not
UpdateCheckSource
Represents the source from where to fetch update information.
UpdateCheckSuccess
Represents the result of an update check.
UserAgentBuilder
Builds a User-Agent string for the update checker.
VersionSupplier
Functional interface to supply the latest version of the plugin.
